detail.description: White Sox challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Jahmai Jones singles on a ground ball to shortstop Luisangel Acuña.
Jahmai Jones singles on a ground ball to left fielder Sam Antonacci.
Jahmai Jones singles on a line drive to right fielder Jo Adell. Kevin McGonigle scores. Dillon Dingler to 3rd. Riley Greene to 2nd.
Jahmai Jones singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Yohendrick Piñango.
Jahmai Jones singles on a line drive to left fielder Jarren Duran.
Jahmai Jones doubles (2) on a ground ball to left fielder Alejandro Osuna.
Jahmai Jones homers (2) on a fly ball to left field.
Jahmai Jones singles on a line drive to left fielder Michael Massey. Gleyber Torres scores.
Jahmai Jones singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Chandler Simpson, deflected by third baseman Junior Caminero.
Jahmai Jones homers (3) on a fly ball to left field. Andruw Monasterio scores.
Jahmai Jones singles on a line drive to center fielder Jarren Duran. Riley Greene scores. Dillon Dingler to 3rd.
Jahmai Jones homers (1) on a fly ball to center field.
Jahmai Jones doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Jarren Duran. Kevin McGonigle to 3rd.

Red Sox challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Jahmai Jones singles on a line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Jahmai Jones out at 2nd on the throw, center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela to second baseman Marcelo Mayer. Kevin McGonigle to 3rd.
Jahmai Jones singles on a line drive to center fielder Dane Myers. Spencer Torkelson scores.
